ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password hash for authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_superuser" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has superuser privileges */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "is_staff" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is a staff member */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user registered */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the user */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of consecutive failed login attempts */,
  "account_locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the account is locked due to failed login attempts */,
  "verified_phone" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's phone number has been verified */,
  "verified_email" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's email has been verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's permissions and responsibilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or string of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "revoked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was revoked (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login attempt */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user attempting to log in */,
  "attempt_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the login attempt */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the login attempt was successful */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the login attempt was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string to identify the device and browser used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the login attempt (city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_attempts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_resets" (
  "reset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting the password reset */,
  "request_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the password reset request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the password reset request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "token" TEXT /* Unique token sent to the user for password reset */,
  "token_expires" TEXT /* Timestamp when the token expires */,
  "reset_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who completed the password reset (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_resets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_resets_reset_by FOREIGN KEY ("reset_by") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action occurred */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Categorizes the action (e.g., login, logout, update profile, password reset) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string to identify the device and browser used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the action (city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string to identify the device and browser used */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the session was started */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the session start (city, country) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)
